term: Put a Lot of Thought Into
englishDefinitions: To spend time carefully thinking about something before making a decision or creating something.
persianTranslation: با دقت دربارهٔ چیزی فکر کردن
خیلی برای چیزی فکر و برنامه‌ریزی کردن
examples: She put a lot of thought into her presentation.
You can tell he put a lot of thought into this gift.
We put a lot of thought into our travel plans.
